by
  rw [discreteTopology_iff_open_singleton_one]
  let V := {z : Circle | 0 < z.val.re}
  have hV : IsOpen V := is_open_lt continuous_const Complex.continuous_re.subtype_val
  refine ⟨{f | ∀ x, f x ∈ V}, ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_maps_to isCompact_univ hV, ?_⟩
  ext f
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.subset_def]
  constructor
  · intro hf
    ext x
    apply Complex.ext_abs_arg (by rw [Circle.abs_coe, Complex.abs_one])
    by_contra h_ne
    -- We show that if arg(f x) ≠ 0, then by repeatedly doubling the angle (squaring the element),
    -- we eventually exit the range (-π/2, π/2), contradicting that the image is in V.
    have h_pow : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < ((f x) ^ (2 ^ n)).val.re := fun n ↦ hf (x ^ (2 ^ n))
    have h_arg_double : ∀ n, (f x ^ 2 ^ n).arg = 2 ^ n * (f x).arg := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n ih =>
          rw [pow_succ', pow_mul, ← ih]
          apply Complex.arg_sq_of_re_pos (h_pow n)
    have h_bound : ∀ n, |2 ^ n * (f x).arg| < Real.pi / 2 := by
      intro n
      rw [← h_arg_double n, Complex.abs_arg_lt_pi_div_two_iff]
      exact h_pow n
    have h_zero : (f x).arg = 0 := by
      by_contra h_arg_ne
      have h_abs_pos : 0 < |(f x).arg| := abs_pos.mpr h_arg_ne
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := exists_nat_gt (Real.pi / (2 * |(f x).arg|))
      have : Real.pi / 2 < |2 ^ n * (f x).arg| := by
        rw [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (pow_nonneg (by norm_num) _), ← div_lt_iff h_abs_pos]
        calc
          Real.pi / (2 * |(f x).arg|) < n := hn
          _ ≤ 2 ^ n := Nat.lt_pow_self (by norm_num) n
      linarith [h_bound n]
    exact h_ne h_zero
  · rintro rfl x
    simp [V, zero_lt_one]

by
  refine discreteTopology_of_open_singleton_one _ ?_
  let V := {z : circle | 0 < z.val.re}
  let U := {f : PontryaginDual M | f '' Set.univ ⊆ V}
  have hU : IsOpen U := ContinuousMap.isOpen_gen Set.univ V 
    (continuous_re.isOpen_preimage _ isOpen_Ioi) isCompact_univ
  refine ⟨U, hU, fun _ _ ↦ Real.zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rintro f hf
  ext x
  let z := f x
  have hz : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < (z ^ n).val.re := fun n ↦ 
    hf (Set.mem_image_of_mem f Set.univ (x ^ n))
  by_contra h_ne
  let θ := (z : ℂ).arg
  have hθ_ne : θ ≠ 0 := mt (fun h ↦ by ext; simp [← Complex.abs_mul_exp_arg_mul_I (z:ℂ), h]) h_ne
  have hθ_bound : |θ| < Real.pi / 2 := 
    (Complex.abs_arg_lt_pi_div_two_iff_re_pos (by simp)).mpr (hz 1)
  let n := ⌊Real.pi / (2 * |θ|)⌋₊ + 1
  have hn_pos : 0 < n := Nat.succ_pos _
  have h_gap : Real.pi / 2 < n * |θ| ∧ n * |θ| < Real.pi := by
    have h_div : 0 < Real.pi / (2 * |θ|) := div_pos Real.pi_pos (mul_pos two_pos (abs_pos.mpr hθ_ne))
    constructor
    · calc Real.pi / 2 = (Real.pi / (2 * |θ|)) * |θ| := by field_simp [abs_pos.mpr hθ_ne]
        _ < n * |θ| := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.lt_floor_add_one _) (abs_pos.mpr hθ_ne)
    · calc n * |θ| ≤ (Real.pi / (2 * |θ|) + 1) * |θ| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.floor_add_one_le_self _) (abs_nonneg _)
        _ = Real.pi / 2 + |θ| := by field_simp [abs_pos.mpr hθ_ne]; ring
        _ < Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi / 2 := add_lt_add_left hθ_bound _
        _ = Real.pi := by ring
  have h_re_neg : (z ^ n).val.re < 0 := by
    rw [← Complex.cos_arg, Complex.arg_pow_of_abs_arg_le_pi (n * θ) _]
    · cases le_total 0 θ with
      | inl hθ => 
        rw [abs_of_nonneg hθ] at h_gap
        exact Real.cos_neg_of_pi_div_two_lt_of_lt h_gap.1 h_gap.2
      | inr hθ =>
        rw [abs_of_nonpos hθ] at h_gap
        rw [← Real.cos_neg, neg_mul_eq_mul_neg]
        exact Real.cos_neg_of_pi_div_two_lt_of_lt h_gap.1 h_gap.2
    · rw [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]
      exact h_gap.2.le
  linarith [hz n]

  let V := {z : circle | 0 < z.re}

    rw [ContinuousMap.isOpen_gen]

  suffices U = {1} by rwa [this] at hU_open
  ext f
  simp only [U, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.image_subset_iff, Set.mem_univ, forall_true_left]
  constructor
  · intro hf
    let K := f '' Set.univ
    have hK : IsCompact K := isCompact_univ.image f.continuous
    obtain ⟨w, ⟨m, -, rfl⟩, hw_max⟩ := hK.exists_forall_ge (Set.nonempty_image_iff.mpr Set.univ_nonempty)
      (Continuous.continuousOn (continuous_abs.comp (continuous_subtype_val.sub continuous_const)) K)
    have : f m = 1 := by
      by_contra hw_ne
      have : Complex.abs (f m - 1) < Complex.abs (f m ^ 2 - 1) := by
        norm_cast
        rw [sq_sub_one, Complex.abs_mul]
        apply (lt_mul_iff_one_lt_right (Complex.abs_pos.mpr (sub_ne_zero.mpr hw_ne))).mpr
        rw [← Real.sq_lt_sq (by norm_num) (Complex.abs_nonneg _), one_pow, Complex.normSq_eq_abs,
            Complex.normSq_add, Complex.normSq_one, Complex.normSq_eq_abs, Complex.abs_coe_circle,
            one_pow, mul_one, Complex.add_re, Complex.one_re]
        linarith [hf ⟨m, Set.mem_univ _, rfl⟩]
      specialize hw_max (f m ^ 2) ⟨m^2, Set.mem_univ _, map_pow f m 2⟩
      norm_cast at hw_max
      linarith
    ext x
    specialize hw_max (f x) ⟨x, Set.mem_univ _, rfl⟩
    rw [this, Subtype.coe_one, sub_self, Complex.abs_zero] at hw_max
    norm_cast at hw_max
    rw [← Subtype.coe_inj, Complex.eq_zero_of_abs_eq_zero (le_antisymm hw_max (Complex.abs_nonneg _))]
    simp
  · rintro rfl x
    simp [V]

    let U := {z : Circle | 0 < z.re}
    have hU : IsOpen U := isOpen_lt continuous_const (continuous_re.comp continuous_subtype_val)
    have : {1} = {f : PontryaginDual M | f '' Set.univ ⊆ U} := by
      ext f
      simp only [Set.image_univ, Set.subset_def, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      refine ⟨fun h x => by rw [h]; simp [U], fun h => ?_⟩
      let S : Subgroup Circle :=
        { f.mrange with
          inv_mem' := IsCompact.isSubgroup f.mrange (isCompact_range f.continuous) }
      ext x; simpa using S.eq_bot_iff.mp (Circle.subgroup_eq_bot_of_subset h) (f x)
    rw [this]
    exact ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_mapsTo isCompact_univ hU

by
  refine single_mem_nhds_iff_discrete.mp ?_
  -- Use the fact that Circle has no small subgroups
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hNSS⟩ := TopologicalGroup.exists_nhds_one_subgroup_subset_eq_bot Circle
  -- The set of homomorphisms mapping M into U is a neighborhood of 1
  let V := {f : PontryaginDual M | Set.range f ⊆ U}
  have hV : V ∈ 𝓝 1 :=
    (compactOpen_continuousMonoidHom_topology M Circle).mem_nhds_iff.mpr
      ⟨Set.univ, isCompact_univ, U, hU, fun _ h ↦ by simpa using h⟩
  convert hV
  -- We show V contains only the identity
  ext f
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  refine ⟨fun hf ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ by simp [h]⟩
  -- The range of f is a compact submonoid of Circle, hence a subgroup
  have h_compact : IsCompact (Set.range f) := isCompact_range f.continuous
  have h_subgroup : IsSubgroup (Submonoid.range f) := IsCompact.isSubgroup h_compact
  let G := Subgroup.mk (Submonoid.range f) h_subgroup
  -- Since G ⊆ U and U has no non-trivial subgroups, G is trivial
  have hG_bot : G = ⊥ := hNSS G hf
  -- Thus f is trivial
  ext x
  exact (Subgroup.eq_bot_iff_forall.mp hG_bot) (f x) (Set.mem_range_self x)

single_one_open_iff_discrete.mpr <| by
    let U := {z : circle | 0 < z.val.re}
    have hU : IsOpen U := continuous_re.isOpen_preimage _ isOpen_Ioi
    refine ⟨{f | f '' Set.univ ⊆ U}, ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_mapsTo CompactSpace.isCompact_univ hU, ?_⟩
    ext f
    simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.image_subset_iff,
      Set.preimage_setOf_eq, MonoidHom.one_apply, Circle.one_val, Complex.one_re,
      Complex.zero_lt_one, Set.mem_univ, true_implies]
    refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ h ▸ fun _ ↦ Complex.zero_lt_one⟩
    ext x
    let z := f x
    have hz : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < (z ^ n).val.re := fun n ↦ h (x ^ n)
    by_contra h_ne
    have h_order : IsOfFinOrder z := by
      by_contra h_inf
      have := Circle.dense_zpowers_of_infinite_order h_inf
      obtain ⟨w, hw_mem, hw_re⟩ := this.exists_mem_open isOpen_Iio (-1 : circle) (by simp)
      rcases (Subgroup.mem_zpowers z).mp hw_mem with ⟨n, rfl⟩ | ⟨n, rfl⟩
      · exact (hz n).not_le (by simp at hw_re; exact hw_re.le)
      · simp only [zpow_neg, zpow_natCast, ← inv_pow, Circle.inv_eq_conj, Circle.val_conj, Complex.conj_re] at hw_re
        exact (hz n).not_le (by simp at hw_re; exact hw_re.le)
    obtain ⟨n, hn_pos, hn_eq⟩ := isOfFinOrder_iff_pow_eq_one.mp h_order
    have h_sum : (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => (z ^ i).val) = 0 := by
      rw [Complex.sum_pow_of_ne_one _ (by simpa [Subtype.ext_iff] using h_ne), ← Subtype.val_pow, hn_eq]
      simp
    have h_sum_re : (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => (z ^ i).val.re) = 0 := by
      rw [← Complex.re_sum, h_sum, Complex.zero_re]
    have h_pos : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range n, 0 < (z ^ i).val.re := fun i _ => hz i
    have h_sum_pos : 0 < (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => (z ^ i).val.re) :=
      Finset.sum_pos h_pos (Finset.nonempty_range_iff.mpr hn_pos)
    linarith

    let U : Set Circle := {z | 0 < z.re}

by
  rw [discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton]
  let U := {z : Circle | 0 < z.re}
  have hU : IsOpen U := isOpen_lt continuous_const Complex.continuous_re
  have eq_one : {f : PontryaginDual M | f '' Set.univ ⊆ U} = {1} := by
    ext f; simp only [Set.image_univ, Set.subset_def, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · intro h
      ext x
      let z := f x
      by_contra z_ne_1
      let θ := Complex.arg z
      have h_arg : θ ∈ Set.Ioo (-(Real.pi/2)) (Real.pi/2) :=
        Complex.abs_arg_lt_pi_div_two_iff.mpr (h x 1)
      have θ_ne_0 : θ ≠ 0 := mt (fun h0 ↦ Subtype.ext <| by
        rw [← Complex.abs_mul_exp_arg_mul_I z, Complex.abs_coe_circle, h0, Real.exp_zero, mul_one]) z_ne_1
      let α := |θ|
      have α_pos : 0 < α := abs_pos.mpr θ_ne_0
      have α_small : α < Real.pi / 2 := abs_lt.mp h_arg |>.2
      have exists_N : ∃ n, Real.pi / 2 < n * α := exists_nat_mul_gt α_pos (Real.pi / 2)
      let N := Nat.find exists_N
      have hN : Real.pi / 2 < N * α := Nat.find_spec exists_N
      have hN_min : ∀ k < N, k * α ≤ Real.pi / 2 := fun k hk ↦ le_of_not_lt (Nat.find_min exists_N hk)
      have N_pos : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h0 ↦ by simp [h0] at hN; linarith [Real.pi_pos]
      have range_N : N * α ∈ Set.Ioc (Real.pi / 2) Real.pi := by
        constructor; exact hN
        calc (N : ℝ) * α = ((N - 1) : ℕ) * α + α := by
               rw [← add_one_mul, Nat.sub_add_cancel N_pos]
             _ ≤ Real.pi / 2 + α := add_le_add_right (hN_min (N - 1) (Nat.pred_lt N_pos.ne')) _
             _ < Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi / 2 := add_lt_add_left α_small _
             _ = Real.pi := add_halves _
      have re_neg : (z ^ N).re ≤ 0 := by
        rw [← Complex.abs_mul_exp_arg_mul_I z, Complex.abs_coe_circle, one_mul]
        rw [← Complex.exp_nat_mul, Complex.exp_mul_I, Complex.add_re, mul_comm _ θ]
        rw [← Real.cos_abs (θ * N), abs_mul, abs_of_nat]
        exact Real.cos_nonpos_of_pi_div_two_le_of_le range_N.1 range_N.2
      have re_pos : 0 < (z ^ N).re := h x N
      linarith
    · rintro rfl x n; simp; exact zero_lt_one
  rw [← eq_one]
  exact ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_maps_to isCompact_univ hU

by
  rw [single_one_open_iff_discrete]
  let U : Set Circle := {z | 0 < z.val.re}
  have hU : IsOpen U := isOpen_lt continuous_const Circle.continuous_val.re
  have : IsOpen {f : PontryaginDual M | ∀ x, f x ∈ U} := by
    rw [isOpen_induced_iff]
    use {f : C(M, Circle) | f '' Set.univ ⊆ U}
    refine ⟨ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_mapsTo isCompact_univ hU, ?_⟩
    ext; simp [Set.image_subset_iff]
  convert this
  ext f
  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h x => by simp [h, U]; exact zero_lt_one⟩
  ext x
  by_contra hx
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := Complex.exists_pow_re_le_zero (f x).abs_eq (fun h => hx (Subtype.ext h))
  have hp : 0 < ((f x) ^ n).val.re := by rw [← map_pow]; exact h (x ^ n)
  simp at hp
  exact not_le_of_lt hp hn

    ext f

    constructor
    · intro hf
      ext x
      let z := f x
      by_contra h_ne
      have h_arg : z.arg ≠ 0 := mt (fun h => Subtype.ext (Complex.ext_abs_arg (by simp) h.symm)) h_ne
      let θ := |z.arg|
      have hθ : 0 < θ := abs_pos.mpr h_arg
      have hθ_pi : θ ≤ Real.pi := abs_le.mpr (Complex.arg_mem_nhds z).2
      let k := Nat.floor (Real.pi / (2 * θ)) + 1
      have hk : Real.pi / 2 < k * θ := by
        rw [← div_lt_iff (mul_pos two_pos hθ)]
        exact Nat.lt_floor_add_one _
      have hk' : k * θ ≤ Real.pi := by
        have := Nat.le_floor (x := Real.pi / (2 * θ))
        rw [le_div_iff (mul_pos two_pos hθ)] at this
        calc (k : ℝ) * θ = (k - 1 + 1) * θ := by simp
          _ = (k - 1) * θ + θ := by ring
          _ ≤ Real.pi / 2 + θ := by linarith
          _ ≤ Real.pi := by
             by_cases h : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2; · linarith
             · have : k = 1 := by
                 have : Real.pi / (2 * θ) < 1 := (div_lt_one (mul_pos two_pos hθ)).mpr (by linarith)
                 rw [Nat.floor_eq_zero.mpr (le_of_lt this)]; rfl
               rw [this]; simp; exact hθ_pi
      have : (z ^ k).re ≤ 0 := by
        rw [show (z^k).re = Real.cos (k * z.arg) by
          have : (z^k : ℂ) = Complex.exp (Complex.I * (k * z.arg)) := by
            rw [← Complex.exp_nat_mul, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, ← Complex.ofReal_nat_cast, Complex.exp_mul_I, circle.coe_inv_exp_iff_eq_complex_exp]
            exact ⟨z.arg, rfl⟩
          rw [this, Complex.exp_mul_I, Complex.cos_ofReal]
          rfl]
        rw [Real.cos_eq_cos_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nat]
        exact Real.cos_nonpos_of_pi_div_two_le_abs_of_le hk.le hk'
      linarith [hf (x^k)]
    · rintro rfl x; simp [circle.one_re]; norm_num)

    by_contra h_ne
    have h_not_fin : ¬ IsOfFinOrder z := by
      intro h_fin
      obtain ⟨k, hk, hzk⟩ := isOfFinOrder_iff_pow_eq_one.mp h_fin
      have : ∑ i in Finset.range k, (z ^ i : ℂ) = 0 := by
        rw [geom_sum_eq h_ne k, hzk]
        simp
      have : ∑ i in Finset.range k, (z ^ i).re = 0 := by
        rw [← Complex.re_sum, this, Complex.zero_re]
      have : 0 < ∑ i in Finset.range k, (z ^ i).re :=

    obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := this.exists_mem_open (isOpen_lt Complex.continuous_re continuous_const) ⟨-1, by norm_num⟩
    cases n
    · linarith [hz n]
    · rw [zpow_neg_succ, ← star_eq_inv, star_re] at hn; linarith [hz (n_1 + 1)]
  · rintro rfl x -
    norm_num

  rw [discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton_one]
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hU_sub⟩ := TopologicalGroup.no_small_subgroups (G := Circle)
  obtain ⟨V, hV_open, hV_one, hV_sub⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.mp hU
  refine ⟨{f | ∀ x, f x ∈ V}, isOpen_induced (ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_maps_to isCompact_univ hV_open), ?_⟩
  ext f
  simp only [mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, MonoidHom.one_apply]
  refine ⟨fun hf => ?, fun h x => h.symm ▸ hV_one⟩
  let S := MonoidHom.mrange f
  have hS_inv : ∀ x ∈ S, x⁻¹ ∈ S := Submonoid.isSubgroup_of_isCompact S (isCompact_range f.continuous)
  let G : Subgroup Circle := { S with inv_mem' := hS_inv }
  have hG_sub : (G : Set Circle) ⊆ U := fun z ⟨x, hx⟩ => hx ▸ hV_sub (hf x)
  ext x
  exact (hU_sub G hG_sub).symm ▸ G.one_mem

  ext x

  by_contra hx

    intro z hz
    have : ‖(z:ℂ) + 1‖ ^ 2 = 4 - ‖(z:ℂ) - 1‖ ^ 2 := by
      simpa [Complex.norm_sq_add_norm_sq_sub, z.abs_coe] using by norm_num
    rw [sq_sub_sq, Complex.norm_mul]; nlinarith

  linarith [hn, norm_sub_le (f x ^ 2 ^ n : ℂ) 1]

  rw [discreteTopology_iff_open_singleton_one]
  let U := {z : 𝕊 | 0 < z.re}
  have hU : IsOpen U := continuous_re.isOpen_preimage _ (isOpen_Ioi 0)
  refine ⟨{f | ∀ x, f x ∈ U}, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [isOpen_induced]
    exact ⟨{f : C(M, 𝕊) | ∀ x, f x ∈ U},
      ContinuousMap.isOpen_setOf_mapsTo CompactSpace.isCompact_univ hU, rfl⟩
  · rw [Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem]
    refine ⟨fun _ ↦ zero_lt_one, fun f hf ↦ ?_⟩
    ext x
    by_contra hx
    let t := (f x).arg
    have ht : 0 < |t| := abs_pos.mpr (mt Circle.arg_eq_zero_iff.mpr hx)
    obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := Nat.exists_mul_ge_of_pos (π / 2) ht
    let k := Nat.find ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hk₁ : π / 2 ≤ k * |t| := Nat.find_spec ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hk_pos : 0 < k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h ↦ by simp [h] at hk₁; linarith [pi_pos]
    have hk₂ : k * |t| ≤ π := by
      have : (k - 1) * |t| < π / 2 := by
        refine lt_of_not_ge (Nat.find_min ⟨n, hn⟩ (Nat.pred_lt (ne_of_gt hk_pos)))
      rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hk_pos), add_mul, one_mul]
      have : |t| < π / 2 := Real.abs_lt_pi_div_two_of_cos_pos (hf x) (Complex.arg_le_pi _) (Complex.neg_pi_lt_arg _)
      linarith
    have : ((f x) ^ k).re ≤ 0 := by
      rw [← coe_pow, Circle.coe_eq_exp_mul_I_arg, ← Complex.exp_nat_mul, Complex.exp_mul_I,
        add_re, mul_zero, sub_zero, one_mul, Real.cos_abs]
      exact Real.cos_nonpos_of_pi_div_two_le_of_le hk₁ hk₂
    rw [map_pow] at this
    linarith [hf (x ^ k)]
